title: Riot jumps 10% as AMD signs additional 25 MW AI deployment: Q1 Earnings
text: Riot Platforms reports Q1 data center revenue with strong AMD partnership expansion. The company jumped 10% as AMD signed additional 25 MW AI deployment capacity at the Rockdale data center facility. Q1 2026 earnings showed Riot successfully delivering its first data center revenue of $33.2 million, comprised of operating lease and tenant fit-out services. The stock reaction reflected positive sentiment around the strategic transition from pure bitcoin mining to AI infrastructure operator. AMD's exercise of the additional 25 MW option brought the total contracted capacity to 50 MW with a projected $636 million in revenue over the primary 10-year period. This expansion demonstrates strong customer confidence in Riot's infrastructure capabilities and execution. The company's data center segment showed a 91% gross margin on operating lease revenue, indicating the high-margin nature of the data center business model. Riot's ability to monetize its existing power capacity through AMD partnership represents a major inflection point in the company's revenue and profitability potential.
